doc.description: Reading of multiple HX711 strain gauge sensors.

define.name: HX711_GAIN
define.description: The gain of the sensor in pulses (128: 1)

define.name: HX711_PWM_FREQUENCY
define.description: Frequency of the generated PWM signal for clock precision of 0.5MHz

configure.name: HX711_CLOCK
configure.description: PWM to use for the clock

define.name: HX711_DEVICES_NB
define.description: The amount of sensors to read

define.name: HX711_DEVICES
define.description: The list of sensor port/pin pairs to read
